creator: freebsd-ports@t-b-o-h.net
text:
Upgrade Data-Validate-IP from 0.11 to 0.12

Fix: It hasn't completely updated in all mirrors/etc, so fetching the
file from the normal places is failing. Hopefully by the time this is 
reviewed and committed, it'll be there. You can see it currently at :

http://search.cpan.org/CPAN/authors/id/N/NE/NEELY/Data-Validate-IP-0.12.tar.gz

	Otherwise, out of curiosity, in :

http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/porting-submitting.html

	it mentions "Once we have looked at your port, we will get back to you if necessary, and put it in the tree. Your name will also appear in the list of Additional FreeBSD Contributors and other files. Isn't that great?!? :-)"

	I've got a few ports in, but am not on the list. Has it stopped being
updated or do I not just rank? ;)


				Tuc
